surface: mocked cargo validation + serialized live SDK validation

assertions.reason: Mocked cargo coverage reran cleanly: `compatibility_surface_supports_create_and_stored_completion_crud` proved `store=true` create plus stored retrieve/update/list/delete routing and an update body of exactly `metadata`, and `stored_chat_retrieve_accepts_nullable_tool_calls` proved stored-chat retrieval deserializes `tool_calls: null`. The live SDK probe then created stored completion `chatcmpl-DRPmXrXM8NMduQ4UOalghkPdvlA8p` (`stored_create_request_id=req_fa5989976d1f441a88328e88ab419a8b`), hit one transient 404 on retrieve, succeeded on retry 2 with request id `req_1418b9c8bad344d395ed99f49c9419c7` and `retrieve_first_message_tool_calls_len=0` with no parse error, and cleaned up successfully via delete request id `req_5192e80918d245788de2cefeac7abdcd`.

commands.observation: The narrow mocked contract test passed and, per the exercised assertions in `tests/chat_completions_contract.rs`, covers `store=true` creation, stored retrieve/update/list/delete routes, and verifies the update request body is exactly `{"metadata": ...}`.

The nullable-tool-call regression test passed, proving stored-chat retrieval accepts a real response shape where `message.tool_calls` is `null` and surfaces it as an empty vector instead of a parse failure.

commands.observation: The live SDK probe resolved the default host to `https://api.openai.com/v1`, created stored completion `chatcmpl-DRPmXrXM8NMduQ4UOalghkPdvlA8p`, saw one transient `Api(NotFound)` retrieve on attempt 1 (`req_41ffa5b6bec74ddaaab39c6d52c54b05`), then retrieved successfully on attempt 2 (`req_1418b9c8bad344d395ed99f49c9419c7`) with `retrieve_first_message_tool_calls_len=0` and no parse error before deleting the record successfully (`req_5192e80918d245788de2cefeac7abdcd`).

frictions: Live stored-chat retrieval was not immediately consistent: the first retrieve attempt returned 404, and a brief retry loop was needed before the stored completion became retrievable.
summary: VAL-COMPAT-002 passed on rerun: mocked cargo coverage reconfirmed stored-chat CRUD plus nullable `tool_calls` deserialization, and the live SDK probe successfully created, retrieved, and deleted a stored chat completion without the prior parse error.
